caption: Subnet
description: The Subnet object describes a network subnet, including its CIDR block, associated VPC, and availability zone.
name: subnet

cidr.description: The CIDR notation for the subnet. For example: 10.0.1.0/24.

region.description: The region or availability zone of the subnet.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the subnet. For example, an AWS subnet ID.

vpc_uid.description: The unique identifier of the VPC that contains this subnet.
